taskDescription: Build lifecycle-sweep system as a BCOS framework feature shipped in business-context-os-dev. (1) Optional `lifecycle:` frontmatter field with declared exit-trigger schema; (2) Declarative routing config `.claude/quality/lifecycle-routing.yml` covering routes to _archive/, _wiki/, _collections/, _planned/; (3) `lifecycle_sweep.py` job that reads each file's frontmatter + body + cross-checks reality, extends the live typed-event enum + headless-actions registry from autonomy-ux-self-learning, calls record_resolution.py for each routing decision so promote_resolutions.py picks up patterns into the self-learning ladder automatically. Generalized for any BCOS user. theo-portfolio is the first acceptance-test install via update.py.

userApproval.note: Approved after v2 revision incorporating live autonomy-ux infrastructure extension (instead of reserved namespace) and theo-portfolio acceptance test phase.

revisionNote: v2: Re-targeted to business-context-os-dev framework after discovering autonomy-ux-self-learning is 59/79 complete (P0-P7 shipped; P8 conditional + P9 fixed-end pending). Replaces 'reserve namespace + ship parallel' with concrete wire-in tasks against live infrastructure: extend typed-events.md enum, register headless-actions, import digest_sidecar.py, call record_resolution.py from auto-router.

softDependencies.subject: typed-events.md enum + headless-actions.md registry + digest_sidecar.py + record_resolution.py + promote_resolutions.py
softDependencies.rule: Infrastructure is shipped and importable. lifecycle-sweep extends typed-events.md with 4 new finding_types, registers 4 new headless actions, imports digest_sidecar for sidecar I/O, calls record_resolution for every routing decision. Self-learning ladder picks up (lifecycle-* finding_type, lifecycle-route-* action) pairs automatically via promote_resolutions.py — no new ladder code. Schema-version remains 1.0.0.

softDependencies.subject: Silent-tier auto-routing for high-confidence lifecycle rules
softDependencies.rule: Until autonomy-ux P8 ships, lifecycle-sweep auto-routes are tier-1 (preselect) and tier-2 (auto-apply with undo). Silent-tier routing requires P8 entry-criteria (auditor clean 6+ weeks). No new gating required from this plan.

skillsAffected: schedule-dispatcher (new job ref + register in schedule-config template)
bcos-wiki (sweep invokes /wiki promote for wiki routes)
context-audit (cross-check: lifecycle-sweep findings should not double-fire here)
gapsIdentified: No declared exit-trigger schema in frontmatter
No content-aware classifier (existing index-health uses graph topology)
No declarative routing rules (each skill that moves docs hardcodes)
No reality cross-check (body claims vs repo state)
lifecycle-sweep + autonomy-ux infrastructure are not yet wired

relevantLessons.lesson: When a soft-dep plan has shipped its infrastructure (importable scripts, populated schemas), extend it directly rather than reserving namespace. Concrete wire-in beats parallel-ship.
relevantLessons.applicability: P3.5 extends typed-events.md + headless-actions.md inline; P3 imports digest_sidecar/record_resolution.

relevantLessons.lesson: Zone is path-derived, not declared. context_index.py._zone_for() is authoritative; never reimplement.
relevantLessons.applicability: lifecycle_sweep imports _zone_for; routing config destinations reference zone IDs from _context-zones.yml.tmpl.

relevantLessons.lesson: Sweep is classifier + dispatcher. Don't replicate moves; CALL existing skills (/wiki promote, context-ingest Path 5).
relevantLessons.applicability: P3 auto-route executor invokes existing skills.

relevantLessons.lesson: Framework features ship in business-context-os-dev; installs receive them via update.py. Acceptance test runs in a real install before declaring done.
relevantLessons.applicability: P7 runs lifecycle-sweep against theo-portfolio's docs/ as first-install acceptance.

relevantLessons.lesson: Derived artifacts (learned-rules.json) must be byte-stable regeneratable. lifecycle-sweep writes to resolutions.jsonl (append-only source); promote_resolutions regenerates learned-rules byte-stable.
relevantLessons.applicability: P3 wiring test: regenerate learned-rules.json twice, assert byte-equality.

requiredCapabilities.name: context-ingest
requiredCapabilities.reason: Sweep invokes Path 5 for collection routes

phases: Phase 0: Discovery + autonomy-ux completion analysis (DONE in planner)
Phase 1: lifecycle frontmatter field spec — bcos-dev framework
Phase 2: Declarative routing config + schema doc — bcos-dev
Phase 3: Sweep script + classifier + executor — bcos-dev
Phase 3.5: Wire into shipped autonomy-ux infrastructure
Phase 4: Dispatcher job registration + headless-actions registration — bcos-dev
Phase 6: bcos-dev FIXED END — integration audit + ecosystem state + learnings + cross-plan note
Phase 7: theo-portfolio acceptance test — update.py + smoke-test
plan.estimatedDays: 5-8 days for P1-P7, with 2-week surface-only burn-in before flipping auto_fix=true

tasks.content: Run agent + skill discovery
tasks.completionNote: 19 skills, 2 agents

tasks.content: Read autonomy-ux-self-learning plan-manifest.json AND verify completion state
tasks.completionNote: 59/79 done. P0-P7 shipped. Infrastructure importable: typed-events.md (enum live), headless-actions.md (9 actions live), digest_sidecar.py (parse/write API), record_resolution.py (14-field schema), promote_resolutions.py (preselect tier shipped). P8 silent tier conditional; P9 fixed-end pending.

tasks.content: Read framework authority docs (maintenance-lifecycle, content-routing, context-zones, document-standards)
Define wire-in strategy against live autonomy-ux infrastructure
tasks.completionNote: Extend typed-events enum (4 new IDs), register 4 headless-actions, call digest_sidecar+record_resolution. Schema-version stays 1.0.0.

tasks.content: Define lifecycle frontmatter spec in bcos-dev: optional field with trigger types: archive_when, fold_into, expires_after, route_to_wiki_after_days, route_to_collection. Each trigger has a deterministic semantics + body-marker fallback table.
tasks.completionNote: Added Optional Fields YAML example, field-definitions row, and new dedicated subsection 'Lifecycle Triggers' with trigger types table, body-marker table, reality-check explanation, 5 worked examples (proposal/meeting/research/snapshot/transcript), and 'What lifecycle is NOT' subsection.

tasks.content: Document trigger schema with examples per type (5 worked examples)
tasks.completionNote: Combined into the same edit as P1_001 — 5 worked examples integrated under 'Five worked examples' subsection.

tasks.content: Update bcos-dev context-ingest skill: prompt for lifecycle when capturing time-bounded content (Path 1 inbox dump + Path 2 planned + Path 3 integration)
tasks.completionNote: Added optional commented lifecycle hint to _planned deposit template; added new Step 1.5 'Time-Bounded Content — Declare a Lifecycle Trigger' with content-shape suggestion table + AskUserQuestion prompt; added lifecycle-sweep row to Integration with Other Skills table.

tasks.content: Update bcos-dev frontmatter validation hook: accept lifecycle field; warn (not block) on malformed trigger value
tasks.completionNote: Extended YAML parser with nested-map mode (handles both list and map children of bare-key parents); added LIFECYCLE_VALID_TRIGGER_KEYS + LIFECYCLE_DURATION_RE constants and validate_lifecycle() function called from validate_frontmatter(); 3 smoke tests pass (well-formed parses correctly, malformed values warn, existing list parsing not regressed).

tasks.content: Design routing config schema (rule fields: pattern, destination, triggers, body-markers, reality-checks, confidence-tier)
tasks.completionNote: Schema designed with 7 field groups: global block (surface_only, burn_in_weeks, scan_zones, min_age_days, finding_type IDs), and per-rule fields: id, description, match (zones + lifecycle-triggers + cluster-hints + name-patterns), destination (zone + bucket), body-markers (pattern + role + confidence-boost), reality-checks (id + type + description + fail-action), confidence-tier (1/2/3), auto-fix-id. 7 trigger types defined (archive_when, expires_after, route_to_wiki_after_days, route_to_collection, fold_into, body-marker, age-threshold). 7 reality-check types defined.

tasks.content: Create lifecycle-routing.yml template with 9 default rules (outbound-sent/abandoned, decision, meeting-notes, research-dump, snapshot, process-experiment, idea-dead, audit-of-shipped). Destinations reference zone IDs from _context-zones.yml.tmpl, not raw paths.
tasks.completionNote: Created .claude/quality/lifecycle-routing.yml with schema-version 1.0.0, global block (surface_only=true, burn_in_weeks=2, scan_zones=[active,inbox,planned], min_age_days=7), and all 9 rules. All destination.zone values reference ids from _context-zones.yml.tmpl (archive, wiki). Confidence tiers: rules 1-6 tier 2 (preselect), rules 7-9 tier 3 (flag-only). auto-fix-ids: lifecycle-route-archive (7 rules), lifecycle-route-wiki (1), lifecycle-fold-into (1).

tasks.content: Cross-link with _context-zones.yml.tmpl + drift test
tasks.completionNote: Created .claude/scripts/test_lifecycle_routing.py with 15 tests covering: YAML structure, every destination.zone in registry, every match.zone in registry, global.scan_zones in registry, required rule fields, no duplicate ids, confidence-tier range, auto-fix-id values, all 9 expected rules present. Drift test: 15/15 PASS.

tasks.content: Author schema doc explaining each routing rule field
tasks.completionNote: Created docs/_bcos-framework/architecture/lifecycle-routing.md with full schema reference: global block fields, per-rule required fields, match sub-fields, 7 trigger types, destination object, body-marker roles, 7 reality-check types, confidence-tier definitions, 9-rule summary table, burn-in protocol, and relationship table to other architecture docs (document-standards, context-zones, content-routing, maintenance-lifecycle, typed-events, headless-actions, digest_sidecar, record_resolution).

tasks.content: Failing wiring test: lifecycle_sweep.py exists, parses lifecycle-routing.yml, imports _zone_for + digest_sidecar + record_resolution
tasks.completionNote: Wiring test (test_lifecycle_sweep.py): module imports + config parses + zone-resolver + digest_sidecar + record_resolution all import cleanly.

tasks.content: Implement frontmatter trigger evaluator (deterministic: archive_when, fold_into, expires_after, route_to_wiki_after_days, route_to_collection)
tasks.completionNote: Frontmatter trigger evaluator (FrontmatterSignals dataclass + evaluate_frontmatter_triggers); duration parsing covers d/w/m/y; 4 tests passing.

tasks.content: Implement body-signal scanner (regex: SENT:, OUTCOME:, DECISION:, RESOLVED:, PUBLISHED:, ABANDONED:; TODO/PENDING/DRAFT staleness; external URL detection for wiki-promotion candidates)
tasks.completionNote: Body-signal scanner (scan_body_signals); 6 canonical markers + URL detection + staleness markers; line-anchored regex; 5 tests passing.

tasks.content: Implement reality cross-check (git log mentions, sibling-doc existence in _archive/_wiki/_collections/, _wiki/ coverage check via context_index, _collections/manifest row check)
tasks.completionNote: Reality cross-check supports 7 check types (git-log-mention, sibling-version-exists, url-in-body, target-file-exists, next-period-doc-exists, manifest-row-exists, skill-registry-check).

tasks.content: Implement classifier composing frontmatter + body + reality + routing-rule pattern match. Output: route_decision with verdict (auto/ambiguous/leave_alone), destination, reason, confidence
tasks.completionNote: Classifier composes frontmatter+body+reality+rule-pattern; emits RouteDecision with verdict/rule_id/destination/auto_fix_id/confidence/reasons.

tasks.content: Implement auto-route executor: invokes git mv (for _archive/), bcos-wiki promote.md (for _wiki/), context-ingest Path 5 (for _collections/), fold-into operation (for sibling-doc routes). NEVER replicates move logic. Default surface_only=true for first 2 weeks.
tasks.completionNote: Auto-route executor delegates: archive=git mv; wiki=bcos-wiki promote; collection=context-ingest Path 5; fold-into=chat-confirm. surface_only=true never mutates.

tasks.content: Implement lifecycle_sweep.py main entry: walks active zone + inbox zone, classifies each doc, emits typed events, runs auto-route when not surface-only. Output: digest section (markdown) + sidecar findings (delegated to P3.5)
tasks.completionNote: Main entry walks scan_zones, classifies each doc, writes sidecar via digest_sidecar API, appends diary, records resolutions when applied.

tasks.content: Smoke-test against bcos-dev's own docs/ (no false-positives expected on framework docs)
tasks.completionNote: Smoke against bcos-dev's own docs/ returned green: 10 docs scanned, 0 framework false-positives, canonical index/wakeup files not flagged.

tasks.content: Extend typed-events.md enum with 4 new finding_types: lifecycle-trigger-fired, lifecycle-body-marker-confirmed, lifecycle-route-ambiguous, lifecycle-orphan-active. Add to job-emission table under audit-inbox + index-health roles (lifecycle-sweep job is the new emitter).
tasks.completionNote: 4 finding_types added under '### lifecycle-sweep (4)' block in typed-events.md.

tasks.content: Define finding_attrs shape per new finding_type (illustrative + authoritative columns matching existing pattern)
tasks.completionNote: finding_attrs shapes registered in canonical shape table; flat primitives only per L-DASHBOARD-20260425-010.

tasks.content: Register 4 new headless-actions in headless-actions.md: lifecycle-route-archive, lifecycle-route-wiki, lifecycle-route-collection, lifecycle-fold-into. Each declares applies-to (finding_type[]), reversible-by (concrete mechanism), telemetry-event (kebab), default-trigger.
tasks.completionNote: 4 headless-actions registered with full schema in headless-actions.md; handlers in bcos-dashboard/headless_actions.py; HANDLERS dict updated.

tasks.content: Wire lifecycle_sweep.py to digest_sidecar: import parse_sidecar/write_sidecar; emit findings into the existing daily-digest.json sidecar slot using SCHEMA_VERSION='1.0.0'
tasks.completionNote: lifecycle_sweep.py main() imports parse_sidecar/write_sidecar/Finding/ParsedSidecar/JobSummary; idempotent re-run drops prior findings from this job.

tasks.content: Wire auto-route executor to record_resolution.py: every applied route writes a 14-field row to resolutions.jsonl with action_taken=lifecycle-route-*, outcome='applied', subsequent_validation_status='pending'
tasks.completionNote: Auto-route executor calls record_resolution when applied=True; 14-field row with action_taken=lifecycle-route-*, outcome='applied', trigger='scheduled-headless'.

tasks.content: Verify promote_resolutions.py auto-promotes lifecycle-* (finding_type, action_taken) pairs into preselect tier of learned-rules.json after N≥3 + consistency=1.0 — no code change needed; assert via wiring test
tasks.completionNote: promote_resolutions.py auto-picks any (finding_type, action_taken) pair generically — confirmed via test_finding_type_coverage.py + test_promotion_ladder.py still green.

tasks.content: Wiring test: end-to-end — sweep emits typed event → record_resolution writes row → promote_resolutions produces learned rule → byte-stable regeneration
tasks.completionNote: End-to-end wiring test (test_lifecycle_sweep.py + parity test) passes; sidecar shape conforms to fixture.

tasks.content: Run python .claude/scripts/update.py from theo-portfolio (pulls bcos-dev framework changes including lifecycle-sweep)

Verify deploy: lifecycle-routing.yml exists in theo-portfolio .claude/quality/; lifecycle_sweep.py in .claude/scripts/; job-lifecycle-sweep.md in dispatcher refs; schedule-config.json updated; typed-events.md + headless-actions.md updated

Smoke-test: run lifecycle-sweep manually on theo-portfolio (surface-only). Expected: empty ambiguous list (we just hand-archived 9 docs); no false-positives on canonical docs (current-state.md, strategic-thesis.md, repo-ownership-map.md, table-of-context.md, project-map.md)
Run dispatcher Friday slot once manually; verify digest section + sidecar emission + diary append work correctly
After 2-week burn-in with 0 false-positives in surface-only mode, flip lifecycle-routing.yml burn_in flag → enable auto-routing
